queries.question: What benefits do all credit cards have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Benefits.benefitName  from Credit_Card_Benefits join Benefits on Credit_Card_Benefits.benefitId = Benefits.id join Credit_Cards on Credit_Card_Benefits.creditCardId = Credit_Cards.id   GROUP BY Credit_Card_Benefits.benefitId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Credit_Card_Benefits.creditCardId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Credit_Cards)

queries.question: For every credit card, list the benefits they have.
queries.sql: select credit_cards.cardnumber , benefits.benefitname from Credit_Card_Benefits join Benefits on Credit_Card_Benefits.benefitId = Benefits.id join Credit_Cards on Credit_Card_Benefits.creditCardId = Credit_Cards.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?cardnumber ?benefitname WHERE {
  ?credit_card_benefits a :Credit_Card_Benefits .
  ?benefits a :Benefits .
  ?credit_card_benefits p:hasBenefits ?benefits .
  ?credit_cards a :Credit_Cards .
  ?credit_card_benefits p:hasCredit_Cards ?credit_cards .
  ?credit_cards p:cardNumber ?cardnumber .
  ?benefits p:benefitName ?benefitname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the benefits each credit card has.
